tasks.subject: Task 1: Sheet shell and AddPickerSheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the bottom-sheet chrome and the picker step with mini card previews for all six memory types.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: `src/components/sections/memories/AddMemorySheet.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddPickerSheet.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] sheet has grab handle and scrim
- [ ] 6 tile types with miniature previews
- [ ] role=dialog aria-modal=true

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sections/memories/AddMemorySheet.tsx", "src/components/sections/memories/add/AddPickerSheet.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sheet has grab handle and scrim", "6 tile types with miniature previews", "role=dialog aria-modal=true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: AddNoteSheet, AddFoodSheet, AddTicketSheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the three text-input compose sheets.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddNoteSheet.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddFoodSheet.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddTicketSheet.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] PASTE IT IN stamp button on all sheets
- [ ] AddFoodSheet has live preview
- [ ] all sheets have back link

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sections/memories/add/AddNoteSheet.tsx", "src/components/sections/memories/add/AddFoodSheet.tsx", "src/components/sections/memories/add/AddTicketSheet.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PASTE IT IN stamp button on all sheets", "AddFoodSheet has live preview", "all sheets have back link"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AddPhotoSheet and AddQuoteSheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Photo caption compose and Line of the Day compose sheets.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddPhotoSheet.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/AddQuoteSheet.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] photo tile triggers file picker
- [ ] quote sheet writes LineOfDay not MemoryEntry
- [ ] char count max 80 shown

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sections/memories/add/AddPhotoSheet.tsx", "src/components/sections/memories/add/AddQuoteSheet.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["photo tile triggers file picker", "quote sheet writes LineOfDay not MemoryEntry", "char count max 80 shown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: useVoiceRecorder hook and VoiceRecordSheet
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement useVoiceRecorder using MediaRecorder + Web Audio API, wire into VoiceRecordSheet.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useVoiceRecorder.ts`
- Create: `src/components/sections/memories/add/VoiceRecordSheet.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] MediaRecorder used for audio capture
- [ ] AnalyserNode downsampled to 30 bars
- [ ] auto-saves VoiceMemory on stop

**Verify:** `npm run build` → no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useVoiceRecorder.ts", "src/components/sections/memories/add/VoiceRecordSheet.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MediaRecorder used for audio capture", "AnalyserNode downsampled to 30 bars", "auto-saves VoiceMemory on stop"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Weather fetching and caching
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fetch weather once per (cityId, date) from wttr.in, cache in IndexedDB.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/utils/fetchWeather.ts`
- Modify: `src/hooks/useDayWeather.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] cache-first weather load
- [ ] fetch failure returns undefined silently
- [ ] no refetch if cached

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm test` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/fetchWeather.ts", "src/hooks/useDayWeather.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cache-first weather load", "fetch failure returns undefined silently", "no refetch if cached"]}
```
